metadata.description: oh-my-gajaecode — focused Gajae Code suite: 9 skills + 12 commands. Explicit presentation and ETA controls, external review, read-only Codex delegation, confirmation-gated deep onboarding, an explicit-install curated preset pack, and explicit-only four-harness read-only research with XDG-only results.

plugins.name: oh-my-gjc
plugins.description: oh-my-gajaecode — focused Gajae Code suite with 9 skills and 12 commands. Skills: adaptive-response, no-english, time-left, extragoal, insane-review, lazycodex-gjc, deep-onboarding, preset-pack, multi-harness-research. Commands: /omg, /omg:setup, /omg:gate, /omg:gate-always, /omg:no-english, /omg:time-left, /omg:fable, /omg:insane-review, /omg:lazycodex-gjc, /omg:deep-onboarding, /omg:preset-pack, /omg:multi-harness. Multi-harness is explicit-only and directly fans the same task to exactly four read-only harnesses; its private user runtime requires Linux, bubblewrap, and existing provider logins, while only XDG state outside the project receives results. Preset-pack merges the curated daily/agent profiles into the user's models.yml only on explicit command, after backup, name-scoped. The installer itself never modifies models.yml.
